content.json:
# FinOps Agent - Cost Optimization Dashboard
Track cost savings, recommendations, and optimization progress.

content.query: customEvents | where customDimensions.agent_name == 'finops' | extend Savings = todouble(customDimensions.estimated_savings) | summarize TotalSavings = sum(Savings) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | render columnchart
content.title: Daily Cost Savings Identified

content.query: customEvents | where customDimensions.agent_name == 'finops' | extend ResourceType = tostring(customDimensions.resource_type), Savings = todouble(customDimensions.estimated_savings) | summarize TotalSavings = sum(Savings), Count = count() by ResourceType | order by TotalSavings desc | render barchart
content.title: Savings by Resource Type
